intent: Pin the maturity computation contract: every active system has a row; missing evidence drops to level 0; structural signals downgrade level; priority freshness caps at level 3; spoofed evidence (has_evidence=true with structural failures) cannot upgrade past level 1.

cases.description: Attacker sets has_evidence=true on a system that still has 2 structural signals failing.
cases.expected_outcome: level=1 Emerging; spoofed evidence does not upgrade.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by maturity.test.ts:'spoofed evidence (has_evidence true) cannot upgrade past level 1 if structural signals remain'

cases.description: All structural signals clean, ready trust, but priority artifact stale (>24h).
cases.expected_outcome: level capped at 3 Stable; staleness_caps_applied incremented.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by maturity.test.ts:'clean structural + stale freshness ⇒ caps at level 3 with bookkeeping'

cases.expected_outcome: level=0 Unknown; key_gap reflects missing evidence.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by maturity.test.ts:'zero evidence ⇒ level 0 Unknown'

cases.description: Maturity universe must equal active_system_ids; no future / deprecated rows.
cases.expected_outcome: rows_count == ranking_universe_size; every active system has a row.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by maturity.test.ts:'all active systems are rows; universe size matches contract'
verified by maturity.test.ts:'returns fail-closed when contract is missing'

fixes_applied.rationale: Centralized 0-4 level engine pulling from registry contract + evidence + trust gap signals + freshness gate. Staleness cap is bookkeeping-tracked so the operator can see why a system did not advance.
Persists the maturity report so it is reviewable as a governed artifact and can be diffed across runs.
Surfaces the engine result through a route the dashboard can consume, with sources block listing the contributing artifacts.
